meaning: n.(巴基斯坦)斯瓦特地区的穆斯林居民
examples: "The show will be about our lives as young, black women, " said Swati Dlamini.
"We're not wearing 'I'm a Mandela' T-shirts, " said Swati Dlamini, granddaughter of Winnie Madikizela-Mandela.
Her 32-year-old sister Swati Dlamini is a single mother with a 3-year-old daughter.
